_note: All names, IDs, addresses, dates and data in this file are synthetic and fictional. Never use real customer data.

cases.symptom: The registration was rejected because the market location is shown as not participating.
cases.goal: Find the rejection reason and determine whether a new installation must be created.

cases.statustext: APERAK received, but the registration confirmation is overdue.
cases.symptom: The registration was acknowledged automatically but no final confirmation arrived.
cases.goal: Confirm processing status, obtain a reference number, and avoid an unnecessary resubmission.

cases.statustext: Identification returned no unique market location for the address.
cases.symptom: The building contains several delivery points and the address alone is ambiguous.
cases.goal: Use the meter number to identify and confirm the correct market location.

cases.statustext: The confirmed supply start differs from the requested date.
cases.symptom: The grid operator confirmed supply two weeks later than requested.
cases.goal: Clarify the reason for the delay and request correction of the supply start.

cases.statustext: The submitted meter number could not be found.
cases.symptom: The customer supplied a meter number that is not known to the grid operator.
cases.goal: Validate the meter number and determine the correct identifier for registration.

cases.statustext: Registration rejected because another registration is already active.
cases.symptom: A duplicate-registration response was returned although only one request is visible internally.
cases.goal: Identify the competing registration and confirm which request should remain active.

cases.statustext: Customer master data does not match the grid operator records.
cases.symptom: The customer name and address formatting differ from the grid operator master data.
cases.goal: Confirm the accepted master data and update the registration accordingly.

cases.symptom: No confirmation or rejection was received within the expected processing period.
cases.goal: Locate the request, obtain its processing state, and confirm the next deadline.

cases.statustext: The contacted company is not responsible for this market location.
cases.symptom: The registration was routed to the wrong grid operator.
cases.goal: Identify the responsible grid operator and document the correct routing information.

cases.statustext: The previous supplier has not completed deregistration.
cases.symptom: The new registration is blocked by an active previous-supplier assignment.
cases.goal: Confirm the pending deregistration and establish when the new registration can proceed.
